name: Butler's Bus Svc
inc_date: 2009-11-05 (NH foreign profit corp registration); company operating since 1949
officers: Originally founded by Arland Butler 1949; sold 1994 to Judith Currier and Gerald Chapdelaine; acquired July 2006 by John Lyskawa and Emo Chynoweth; acquired by Beacon Mobility 2025
registry_source: New Hampshire Secretary of State QuickStart Business Search (NH business ID 621815); cross-referenced OpenCorporates
notes: FMCSA record physical address is Woodstock VT (corporate HQ) rather than input Center Barnstead NH (operational/terminal location at 72 S Barnstead Rd). NH SOS shows registration as foreign profit corp at 835 Hanover St Ste 303 Manchester NH 03104. Company is domestic VT corporation registered foreign in NH. Beacon Mobility (Audax Group portfolio) acquired in 2025. Operates 300+ buses across 6 locations (NH: Barnstead, Milford, North Haverhill; VT: Lyndonville, Orleans, White River Junction); FMCSA power units count of 156 reflects DOT-registered units only.
